rows.label: qev013101_MSG0001
rows.name:
Won't you listen to my poetry?
It might be avant-garde, but
buy it if you like it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013101_JNK0010
rows.name: Tip

rows.label: qev013101_SEL0011
rows.name:
Assume he's struggling for money
and try to give him some change.

rows.label: qev013101_JNK0020
rows.name: Refuse

rows.label: qev013101_SEL0021
rows.name:
Decline, stating you have no
need to listen to poetry.

rows.label: qev013101_JNK0030
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: qev013101_SEL0031
rows.name:
Ask if he's a survivor
of the Celeste Three.

rows.label: qev013101_MSG0002
rows.name:
I'm not really struggling for money...
I just want to share my private,
deadly, poetic imagery with you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013101_MSG0003
rows.name:
...Well, I am often told it's
scary and sounds like a curse...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013101_MSG0004
rows.name:
That's a shame... Next time I'll
prepare a poem you'd want to buy,
so please come listen again.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013101_MSG0005
rows.name:
I can't believe it! To think
there's someone who knows I'm a
survivor of that tragic incident![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013101_MSG0012
rows.name:
The mass disappearance incident that
occurred right after arriving on Mira...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013101_MSG0013
rows.name:
Everyone involved in that incident vanished,
leaving only us, the Celeste Three.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013101_MSG0043
rows.name:
I thought everything was just going
to end up swept under the rug...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013101_MSG0006
rows.name:
Is this the will of heaven? It's an
opportunity I could only dream of![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013101_MSG0007
rows.name:
I have a favor to ask of you, who has
an interest in the Celeste Three, but
this place attracts too much attention.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013101_MSG0008
rows.name:
I can't exactly talk openly about
how we were transporting the
precious resource "White Gold".[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013101_MSG0009
rows.name:
What do you say? Shall we
talk at the diner at night?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013101_MSG0010
rows.name:
Then let's meet at the Industrial
District diner at midnight.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013101_MSG0011
rows.name:
I don't mind if you're a little
late, but please come before dawn.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013101_MSG0014
rows.name:
Thank you for coming. First, let me
explain the outline of the incident
that befell us, the Celeste Three.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013101_MSG0015
rows.name:
It was a while after we arrived on
Planet Mira... about a month or so ago.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013101_MSG0016
rows.name:
A large number of BLADEs were
transporting a precious resource
called White Gold, when...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013101_MSG0017
rows.name:
Those BLADEs suddenly vanished without
a trace, along with the White Gold.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013101_MSG0018
rows.name:
And the only ones left at the scene
were us, the Celeste Three...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013101_MSG0042
rows.name:
This incident... wasn't some
occult tale of spirited-away
victims like society claims...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013101_JNK0040
rows.name: Show Interest

rows.label: qev013101_SEL0041
rows.name:
Listen closely to find out
what really happened.

rows.label: qev013101_JNK0050
rows.name: Express Doubt

rows.label: qev013101_SEL0051
rows.name:
Ask what happened to
the other survivors.

rows.label: qev013101_MSG0019
rows.name:
Society is abuzz with rumors—that Mira's hyperdimensional
forces were at work, that we were attacked by aliens,
or even that it was the work of ghosts...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013101_MSG0020
rows.name:
Good catch. That is precisely
the question that strikes at
the core of this incident.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013101_MSG0021
rows.name: The truth is a gruesome one.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013101_MSG0022
rows.name:
Briggs, who managed the team, wanted the
White Gold for himself and began killing
the team members one after another.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013101_MSG0023
rows.name:
Myself and the other survivor, Moahouse,
cooperated with him because we wanted to
live... and we laid hands on our own comrades.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013101_MSG0024
rows.name:
Following Briggs's orders, we transported
the White Gold... then sent up a distress
signal and waited for rescue.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013101_MSG0025
rows.name:
We mutually agreed to align our
stories and claim we didn't remember
anything from that time...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013101_MSG0026
rows.name:
And so Briggs and the rest of us
returned to this city as victims
caught up in a mysterious incident...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013101_JNK0060
rows.name: Assert

rows.label: qev013101_SEL0061
rows.name: Propose catching Briggs.

rows.label: qev013101_JNK0070
rows.name: Blame

rows.label: qev013101_SEL0071
rows.name: Censure Fosdyke for his crimes.

rows.label: qev013101_JNK0080
rows.name: Insist

rows.label: qev013101_SEL0081
rows.name: Demand the White Gold.

rows.label: qev013101_MSG0027
rows.name:
Full of hot blood, aren't you? Yes, that's
exactly what I want to ask of you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013101_MSG0028
rows.name:
Ah, that may be so... But you can't forgive
the mastermind just escaping, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013101_MSG0029
rows.name:
I am prepared to go to prison as long
as his evil deeds are made public.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013101_MSG0030
rows.name:
Greedy, aren't you... To do that,
we must first find Briggs.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013101_MSG0031
rows.name:
Briggs apparently found a good
hideout around here, and vanished
somewhere with the White Gold.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013101_MSG0032
rows.name:
All I was left with was a single piece
of White Gold ore, like a glass bead.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013101_MSG0033
rows.name:
...So, I want you to take
this and go meet Moahouse.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013101_MSG0034
rows.name:
He was closer to Briggs than I was,
so he might know his whereabouts.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013101_MSG0035
rows.name:
He's a deeply suspicious man, but I believe
he'll trust you if you show him this.
It's an item only he and I possess.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013101_MSG0036
rows.name:
I'm counting on you, then. He's in the same
circumstances as me, so as long as he understands
the situation, he should definitely cooperate.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013101_MSG0037
rows.name:
Moahouse quit BLADE just like I did,
and should be living in this city
while avoiding public attention.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013101_MSG0038
rows.name:
Maybe he's hiding somewhere
around the Commercial District's
material storage area?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013101_MSG0039
rows.name:
You were safely acknowledged
by Moahouse, I see?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013101_MSG0040
rows.name:
Good... It's finally time to
face Briggs and the White Gold.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013101_MSG0041
rows.name:
We must drag the truth out into the
broad daylight. I'm counting on you.[ST:wait ]
